text.title: Accessibility-First Design Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end example applying Accessibility-First Design to a concrete case.

section.title: Primary button + form-field tokens

example.code:
## Tokens color.fg.button.primary: #ffffff color.bg.button.primary: #1c5fdb (contrast 6.8:1 — pass) motion.button.press: 80ms (reduced-motion: none) spacing.inline-start: 12 (logical, RTL-safe)
## Archetype: button-primary role: button | focus_visible: 2px outline accent-500 | keyboard: Enter/Space → activate

section.note: Every token carries a pass marker; every archetype carries focus_visible. The system prevents SC 1.4.3 + 2.4.7 by design.
